internships.companyOverview: A fintech-focused organisation working on financial intelligence and data analytics.
internships.jobDescription: Support financial market analytics, data modelling, and research-driven product development.
internships.jobRequirements: Enrollment in Data Science, Statistics, Economics, Engineering, Computer Science, or related disciplines. Strong analytical mindset and interest in financial technology.
internships.applicationProcedures: Send CV and supporting documents by email.

internships.companyOverview: An educational technology company specialising in AI, robotics, and large language model applications.
internships.jobDescription: Assist in AI model development, testing, robotics experiments, and EdTech product research.
internships.jobRequirements: Interest in AI, robotics, machine learning, education technology, and software experimentation.
internships.applicationProcedures: Submit application directly by email.
internships.remarks: Suitable for students interested in AI and robotics.

internships.companyOverview: An organisation focusing on gifted education and STEM programme development.
internships.jobDescription: Support STEM projects at schools and institutions, assist in project coordination, and help prepare promotional content.
internships.jobRequirements: Basic computer skills, interest in STEM development, and willingness to support school-based activities.
internships.applicationProcedures: Email CV or contact by WhatsApp.
internships.remarks: Good for students interested in STEM education.

internships.companyOverview: A digital technology training organisation supporting Hong Kong's innovation ecosystem.
internships.jobDescription: Build responsive web pages and assist in maintaining internal learning platforms.
internships.jobRequirements: Knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React. Basic understanding of UI design is preferred.
internships.applicationProcedures: Apply by sending CV and portfolio link.

internships.companyOverview: A technology incubation and innovation support organisation in Hong Kong.
internships.jobDescription: Assist in developing web-based tools for startup support, data management, and internal operations.
internships.jobRequirements: Computer Science or related background. Familiarity with JavaScript, APIs, and Git.
internships.applicationProcedures: Submit CV and GitHub profile by email.
internships.remarks: Good for students interested in startup technology.

internships.companyOverview: A financial technology startup building analytics tools for digital finance.
internships.jobDescription: Develop dashboard interfaces for financial data visualisation and user-facing web applications.
internships.jobRequirements: Experience with React, JavaScript, HTML, CSS. Interest in finance or data visualisation is preferred.
internships.applicationProcedures: Send CV and portfolio.

internships.companyOverview: An AI solution provider focused on business automation and intelligent document processing.
internships.jobDescription: Assist in building AI-powered prototypes, testing models, and preparing demo applications.
internships.jobRequirements: Interest in AI applications, Python, APIs, and web-based prototypes.
internships.applicationProcedures: Send CV and project examples.

internships.companyOverview: A STEM education centre designing coding, robotics, and AI learning programmes.
internships.jobDescription: Prepare STEM teaching materials, coding exercises, and robotics workshop content.
internships.jobRequirements: Interest in STEM education, coding, and curriculum design. Communication skills are important.
internships.applicationProcedures: Apply with CV and short introduction.
internships.remarks: Suitable for students who like teaching and tech.

internships.companyOverview: A data analytics consultancy helping companies use dashboards and predictive analytics.
internships.jobDescription: Clean datasets, create reports, and support dashboard development for business clients.
internships.jobRequirements: Basic knowledge of Python, Excel, statistics, and data visualisation.
internships.applicationProcedures: Email CV and transcript.

internships.companyOverview: A cybersecurity company providing security monitoring and risk assessment services.
internships.jobDescription: Assist in security research, vulnerability documentation, and basic monitoring tasks.
internships.jobRequirements: Interest in cybersecurity, networks, Linux, and basic scripting.
internships.applicationProcedures: Send CV and relevant coursework.
internships.remarks: Good for students interested in security.

internships.companyOverview: A sustainability technology company developing smart energy and IoT solutions.
internships.jobDescription: Support IoT dashboard development, device data monitoring, and web interface improvements.
internships.jobRequirements: Knowledge of JavaScript, APIs, and basic IoT concepts. Python experience is a plus.
internships.applicationProcedures: Submit CV by email.

internships.companyOverview: A health technology startup applying AI to medical imaging and clinical workflow tools.
internships.jobDescription: Assist in literature review, model evaluation, and preparation of AI healthcare demos.
internships.jobRequirements: Interest in medical AI, Python, computer vision, and research.
internships.applicationProcedures: Send CV and research interest statement.

internships.companyOverview: A cloud software company building internal tools and cloud migration solutions.
internships.jobDescription: Assist in building internal dashboards, API integrations, and cloud automation scripts.
internships.jobRequirements: Basic web development skills, JavaScript, Git, and interest in cloud computing.
internships.applicationProcedures: Apply with CV and GitHub link.

internships.companyOverview: A smart city company analysing transport data and mobility patterns.
internships.jobDescription: Analyse transport datasets, prepare visual reports, and support smart city research projects.
internships.jobRequirements: Interest in data analysis, urban technology, Python, and visualisation.
internships.applicationProcedures: Send CV and transcript.

internships.companyOverview: A robotics education company creating hands-on learning kits for schools.
internships.jobDescription: Support robotics workshops, prepare teaching materials, and test classroom robot kits.
internships.jobRequirements: Interest in robotics, Arduino, STEM teaching, and student engagement.
internships.applicationProcedures: Email CV and availability.
internships.remarks: Good for students with robotics background.

internships.companyOverview: A business intelligence startup helping companies understand customer and market data.
internships.jobDescription: Support product research, dashboard testing, and business data analysis.
internships.jobRequirements: Analytical mindset, basic Excel or Python skills, and interest in business technology.
internships.applicationProcedures: Apply with CV and short cover letter.

internships.companyOverview: A software studio building websites and internal tools for SMEs.
internships.jobDescription: Develop responsive pages, fix UI bugs, and integrate frontend pages with REST APIs.
internships.jobRequirements: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and basic Git knowledge.
internships.applicationProcedures: Send CV and portfolio/GitHub link.

internships.companyOverview: A research-oriented AI organisation focused on applied machine learning experiments.
internships.jobDescription: Assist in model testing, experiment tracking, dataset preparation, and literature review.
internships.jobRequirements: Python, machine learning basics, and willingness to read technical papers.
internships.applicationProcedures: Submit CV, transcript, and GitHub if available.

internships.companyOverview: A digital finance company building investment research and reporting tools.
internships.jobDescription: Assist in building reporting dashboards, data import tools, and frontend improvements.
internships.jobRequirements: JavaScript, React, basic finance knowledge, and interest in data-driven applications.
internships.applicationProcedures: Email CV and project links.

internships.companyOverview: A product development company creating web and mobile applications for clients.
internships.jobDescription: Support frontend development, product testing, bug reporting, and feature documentation.
internships.jobRequirements: React, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, communication skills, and product mindset.
internships.applicationProcedures: Apply with CV, portfolio, and GitHub.
internships.remarks: Good for students interested in product engineering.
